summary: Iteration 104 - Route Directory Restructuring + AI Summarization + BM25 + Staleness + Pinned Shortcuts. All 12 backend tests passed. Fixed BM25 vector computation bug (vectors.append inside wrong loop). Frontend features verified via code inspection: staleness indicator, AI summarized badge, drag-to-reorder pinned shortcuts all implemented correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: BM25 bug in ai_embeddings.py - vectors.append(vec) was inside inner loop, causing vectors list to grow exponentially. Moved to outer loop.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ITER104_Training content in agent knowledge base
context_for_next_testing_agent: Route restructuring complete - all 88 route files now in backend/routes/. Key features verified: 1) /api/health returns healthy after restructuring, 2) Login sets session_token via cookie (not JSON), 3) Staleness endpoint GET /train/staleness returns stale_count, fresh_count, never_used_count, topic_staleness, 4) Knowledge query POST /knowledge/query uses TF-IDF with BM25 fallback, 5) AI summarization via Claude Sonnet 4.5 (requires EMERGENT_LLM_KEY), 6) Frontend: Sidebar.js lines 183-210 has drag-to-reorder pinned shortcuts with GripVertical, AgentTraining.js lines 137-162 has staleness indicator, KnowledgeExplorer.js line 152 has ai_summarized badge.

route_restructuring.server_imports_updated: PASS - all imports use routes.routes_xxx pattern

bm25_embeddings.compute_vectors: PASS - BM25 weighted TF-IDF vectors (after bug fix)

bm25_vector_computation.issue: vectors.append(vec) was inside inner for loop, causing vector list to grow exponentially
bm25_vector_computation.fix: Moved vectors.append(vec) outside inner loop to correctly append one vector per document
